title: CT13 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} → CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.entry CT13.Graph.NodeId.tierOne

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.TierOneResidual C ctx → CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.tierOne CT13.Graph.NodeId.tierOneTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.TierOneAbsenceState C ctx → CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.tierOne CT13.Graph.NodeId.fallback

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.FallbackState C ctx → CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.fallback CT13.Graph.NodeId.reconciliation

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.OverlapResidual C ctx →
        CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.reconciliation CT13.Graph.NodeId.overlapTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.ReconciledState C ctx → CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.reconciliation CT13.Graph.NodeId.comparison

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.DeficitResidual C ctx → CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.comparison CT13.Graph.NodeId.deficitTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT13.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT13.ReconciliationCertificate C ctx →
        CT13.Graph.Edge C ctx CT13.Graph.NodeId.comparison CT13.Graph.NodeId.reconciledTerminal

semanticFields.leanType: resource ctx left = resource ctx right

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of candidate payers searched at the first availability tier.
presentation.label: Tier-one payer

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Type uPayer
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.Payer

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all tier-one payer candidates.
presentation.label: Finite payer enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → FinEnum self.Payer
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.payers

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that payer p is available in the current branch.
presentation.label: Tier-one eligibility

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Payer → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.Eligible

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding tier-one payer availability.
presentation.label: Eligibility decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT13.Capability P) → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (payer : self.Payer) → Decidable (self.Eligible ctx payer)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.eligibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of obstructions considered when no tier-one payer is eligible.
presentation.label: Fallback obstruction

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Type uObstruction
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.Obstruction

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of fallback obstructions.
presentation.label: Finite obstruction enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → FinEnum self.Obstruction
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.obstructions

presentation.plainExplanation: A canonical obstruction ensuring that fallback selection is always defined.
presentation.label: Default obstruction

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → self.Obstruction
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.fallbackDefault

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns the cost minimized by the canonical fallback policy.
presentation.label: Obstruction cost

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Obstruction → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.obstructionCost

presentation.plainExplanation: The type used to identify and reconcile resources shared by payers.
presentation.label: Resource identity

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Type uResource
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.Resource

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable equality on resources, used to detect overlap and multiplicity.
presentation.label: Resource equality decision

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → DecidableEq self.Resource
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.resourceDecidableEq

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns to each payer the underlying resource that it consumes.
presentation.label: Payer resource

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Payer → self.Resource
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.resource

presentation.plainExplanation: Returns the ordered payer collection available for a selected fallback obstruction.
presentation.label: Tier-two payers

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT13.Capability P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Obstruction → Core.OrderedCollection self.Payer
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.tierTwo

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns the reconciled numerical contribution of each payer.
presentation.label: Payer charge

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT13.Capability P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Payer → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.charge

presentation.plainExplanation: The total branch-specific demand against which reconciled tier-two charge is compared.
presentation.label: Required demand

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability.demand

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT13.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  CT13.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → CT13.Graph.NodeId → CT13.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT13.Graph.Terminal → CT13.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  CT13.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → CT13.Graph.NodeId → CT13.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {C : CT13.Capability P} → {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} → List CT13.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max (max (max (max (uObstruction + 1) (uPayer + 1)) (uResource + 1)) u_1) u_2)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.Input

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT13.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → CT13.Graph.Terminal → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (C : CT13.Capability P) → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT13.Input C ctx → CT13.ExecutionResult C ctx
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (C : CT13.Capability P) → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT13.Input C ctx → CT13.ExecutionResult C ctx
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (C : CT13.Capability P) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) (input : CT13.Input C ctx),
  (CT13.run C ctx input).outcome.Valid
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (C : CT13.Capability P) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) (input : CT13.Input C ctx),
  CT13.Graph.ValidTrace (CT13.run C ctx input).trace
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (C : CT13.Capability P) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) (input : CT13.Input C ctx),
  ∃ r, r.outcome.Valid ∧ CT13.Graph.ValidTrace r.trace
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (C : CT13.Capability P) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) (input : CT13.Input C ctx)
  (a b : CT13.ExecutionResult C ctx), a = CT13.run C ctx input → b = CT13.run C ctx input → a = b
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {C : CT13.Capability P} {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} (r : CT13.ExecutionResult C ctx),
  r.terminal = CT13.Graph.Terminal.tierOne ∨
    r.terminal = CT13.Graph.Terminal.overlap ∨
      r.terminal = CT13.Graph.Terminal.deficit ∨ r.terminal = CT13.Graph.Terminal.reconciled
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT13.residualKindContracts
